name: [TC-1301] Inventory Valuation — Current (2026-03-29)
steps:
1. Go to /reports/inventory-valuation
2. Set date: 2026-03-29
3. Check each row:
   - P1-V1 (Small S): Qty 22, Cost 1500, Value PKR 33,000
   - P1-V2 (Medium): Qty 0, Cost 1100, Value PKR 0
   - P2-V1 (6mm): Qty 72, Cost 50, Value PKR 3,600
   - P2-V2 (12mm): Qty 45, Cost 80, Value PKR 3,600
   - Total: PKR 40,200
4. Verify P1-V2 appears with 0 qty (not hidden)
5. Verify cost column uses purchase cost, not sale price
expected_result:
- All 4 variants present
- P1-V1 val: PKR 33,000 | P1-V2 val: PKR 0 | P2-V1 val: PKR 3,600 | P2-V2 val: PKR 3,600
- Total: PKR 40,200
- Zero-stock items visible with their cost
notes: This total (40,200) must match Trial Balance inventory account in TC-1701

name: [TC-1302] Inventory Valuation — Historical Point-in-Time (2026-03-10)
steps:
1. /reports/inventory-valuation, set date: 2026-03-10 (after purchases, before any sales)
2. Expected:
   - P1-V1: Qty 30, Val PKR 45,000
   - P1-V2: Qty 5, Val PKR 5,500
   - P2-V1: Qty 100, Val PKR 5,000
   - P2-V2: Qty 50, Val PKR 4,000
   - Total: PKR 59,500
3. Verify report does NOT show current stock (22,0,72,45) — it must show historical stock (30,5,100,50)
expected_result:
- Total: PKR 59,500 (historical, not current)
- If report shows current stock on a past date: CRITICAL BUG (point-in-time broken)
notes: This is one of the most important tests for report accuracy

name: [TC-1303] Inventory Valuation — Before All Transactions (2026-02-28)
steps:
1. /reports/inventory-valuation, set date: 2026-02-28
2. All quantities should be 0, total = PKR 0.00
expected_result:
- All qtys: 0
- Total: PKR 0.00
- No crash, no NaN values

name: [TC-1401] P&L Report — Full Period (2026-03-01 to 2026-03-29)
steps:
1. /reports/profit-loss, range 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-29
2. Check Revenue section:
   - Gross Sales: PKR 34,600 (TX-S1 22,400 + TX-S2 10,000 + TX-S3 2,200)
   - Customer Returns: -PKR 6,500 (TX-CR1 6,000 + TX-CR2 500)
   - Net Revenue: PKR 28,100
3. Check COGS section:
   - Purchases: PKR 61,000
   - Supplier Returns: -PKR 2,700 (TX-SR1 500 + TX-SR2 2,200)
   - Closing Stock: -PKR 40,200
   - Net COGS: ≈ PKR 18,100
4. Gross Profit = 28,100 - 18,100 = ≈ PKR 10,000 (positive)
5. Verify gross profit is positive (sold above cost)
expected_result:
- Net Revenue: PKR 28,100
- Net COGS: ≈ PKR 18,100
- Gross Profit: ≈ PKR 10,000 (positive)
- Report shows gross sales and returns separately
notes: Exact COGS may vary by ±1,000 depending on delivery fee treatment (capitalized vs expensed). Note actual.

name: [TC-1402] P&L — Narrow Date Range (Sales Only Period)
steps:
1. /reports/profit-loss, range 2026-03-10 to 2026-03-14
2. Expected: Revenue = PKR 34,600 (3 sales, no returns in this window)
3. No purchases in this range (all were before Mar 10)
4. Gross profit should be positive
expected_result:
- Revenue: PKR 34,600
- Only transactions between Mar 10–14 included

name: [TC-1403] P&L — Empty Period
steps:
1. /reports/profit-loss, range 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-28
2. No transactions exist in this range
expected_result:
- Revenue: PKR 0.00
- COGS: PKR 0.00
- Net Profit: PKR 0.00
- No crash, no NaN, empty state shown gracefully

name: [TC-1501] Aged Receivables — Current (2026-03-29)
steps:
1. /reports/aged-receivables, date 2026-03-29
2. C1 balance is -6,000 (credit), C2 balance is -500 (credit)
3. Check: do credit-balance customers appear? If yes, with what amount?
4. Total outstanding: PKR 0.00 (all collected)
5. Overdue: PKR 0.00
expected_result:
- Total outstanding: PKR 0.00
- Credit-balance customers either not shown or shown with 0 (not as positive receivables)
- No crash

name: [TC-1502] Aged Receivables — At Peak (2026-03-14)
steps:
1. /reports/aged-receivables, date 2026-03-14
2. Expected:
   - C1 Ahmed Traders: PKR 32,400 in 0-30 day bucket
   - C2 Zara Retail: PKR 2,200 in 0-30 day bucket
   - Total: PKR 34,600
3. All invoices should be in 0-30 days (all are recent)
4. TX-S1 (22,400) and TX-S2 (10,000) listed under C1
5. TX-S3 (2,200) listed under C2
expected_result:
- Total: PKR 34,600
- Both customers in 0-30 day bucket
- Invoice-level breakdown visible

name: [TC-1601] Aged Payables — Current (2026-03-29)
steps:
1. /reports/aged-payables, date 2026-03-29
2. S1 has credit balance (-2,200) → should NOT appear as positive payable
3. S2 has PKR 4,500 remaining
4. Expected: S2 = PKR 4,500, Total = PKR 4,500
5. CRITICAL CHECK: S1 must NOT show as PKR 2,200 owed (wrong direction)
expected_result:
- Total: PKR 4,500 (S2 only)
- S1 not shown or shown as credit (PKR 0 payable)
- If S1 shows as PKR 2,200 payable: CRITICAL BUG

name: [TC-1602] Aged Payables — At Peak (2026-03-09)
steps:
1. /reports/aged-payables, date 2026-03-09
2. Expected: S1 = PKR 51,000, S2 = PKR 10,000, Total = PKR 61,000
3. All invoices in 0-30 day bucket
4. TX-P1 (21,000) and TX-P2 (30,000) under S1
5. TX-P3 (10,000) under S2

name: [TC-1701] Trial Balance — Current (2026-03-29)
steps:
1. /reports/trial-balance, date 2026-03-29
2. Check key accounts:
   - Cash HBL Main: PKR 76,400 (Debit)
   - Cash Cash Box: PKR 45,000 (Debit)
   - Cash JazzCash: PKR 27,200 (Debit)
   - Inventory: PKR 40,200 (Debit)
   - Accounts Receivable: PKR 0 (or net credit -6,500)
   - Accounts Payable: PKR 2,300 net credit (4,500 S2 - 2,200 S1 credit)
3. CRITICAL: Sum of all Debits = Sum of all Credits
4. If unbalanced: log CRITICAL bug with exact difference
expected_result:
- Total Debits = Total Credits (balanced)
- Cash total: PKR 148,600 across 3 accounts
- Inventory: PKR 40,200
- If any NaN, blank, or unbalanced: CRITICAL BUG
notes: Must be balanced. Any imbalance = critical backend accounting bug.

name: [TC-1702] Trial Balance — Before Transactions (2026-02-28)
steps:
1. /reports/trial-balance, date 2026-02-28
2. Only opening balances exist
3. Cash accounts: A1 100,000 + A2 50,000 + A3 20,000 = PKR 170,000 Dr
4. Opening equity/capital: PKR 170,000 Cr
5. Debits = Credits = PKR 170,000
expected_result:
- Balanced at PKR 170,000
- No inventory, no payables, no receivables

name: [TC-1801] Cross-Report Consistency Check
steps:
All checks at date 2026-03-29:

1. Inventory Valuation total (TC-1301) vs Trial Balance Inventory account:
   Both must show PKR 40,200
2. Aged Receivables total vs Trial Balance AR:
   Both must show PKR 0 (or same credit amount)
3. Aged Payables total (PKR 4,500 S2) vs Trial Balance AP (net PKR 2,300):
   Note: AP may differ because credit balance treatment differs between reports
4. COGS cross-check: P&L COGS ≈ Opening Stock + Purchases - Returns - Closing = 0+61,000-2,700-40,200 = PKR 18,100
expected_result:
- Inventory Valuation = Trial Balance Inventory: PKR 40,200 ✓
- Aged Receivables agrees with Trial Balance AR
- P&L COGS ≈ PKR 18,100
notes: If any two reports show different values for the same metric: CRITICAL BUG

name: [TC-1901] Report UI Checks — Formatting, Empty States, Loading
steps:
1. Check all reports for PKR format: numbers show as 'PKR X,XXX.00' (not raw numbers)
2. Check all reports for negative number display: shows as '-PKR X,XXX' or '(PKR X,XXX)'
3. Empty period on any report: shows 'No data' message, not blank or error
4. Date picker: from-date cannot be after to-date
5. After posting a new transaction, changing the report date shows updated data
expected_result:
- Consistent PKR formatting everywhere
- Negative values clearly shown
- Empty states handled gracefully
- Date validation works
